channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Daily Zimbabwe Weather + Tsumo
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Zimbabwe's main cities plus the Tsumo yezuva (proverb of the day). One item per day, dedicated for the Mutapa Times weather autolist.

item.title: Zim weather 17 Jun: Harare mainly clear · high 20° / low 10°
item.description: Harare: high 20°, low 10° (mainly clear) · Bulawayo: high 21°, low 9° (clear sky) · Mutare: high 21°, low 11° (overcast) · Gweru: high 21°, low 9° (clear sky) · Masvingo: high 22°, low 10° (overcast) · Victoria Falls: high 26°, low 12° (clear sky) Tsumo yezuva: Chikuriri chine chimwe. (What is great now will be smaller than another.) #Zimbabwe #Weather #ZimbabweWeather #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
